name: Azoth & Ignis
short_description: A challenging top-down action role-playing game about restoring the soul of the world. Overcome the cursed minions of The Alchemist! Discover the hidden drama! Find incredible loot! Level up! And then power up your build! Break the crystal balls! Explore the dungeons! Replay endlessly!
detailed_description:
Choose one of several classes and design your own character. Battle your enemies and level up in this replayable procedurally generated approach to the Souls-like Action RPG formula. Find more powerful loot in deeper areas of the dungeon. Customize and upgrade your build. Gather Anima from fallen enemies and add their power to your own.

Break the spells!

A gold curse frenzy has taken hold of all the subjects of the kingdom. You must fight through factions of mad Witches, Knights, Clerics and Rogues and more to reach The Alchemist! Each new room brings treasure, new enemies, and poetic notes of hidden drama.

Classes

Choose your class of character to challenge The Alchemist and all his minions.

  • Witch: Harness the latent magic of the grimoire to power an endless flow of ranged mana-based attacks.

  • Knight: Forego all magicks and tricks and face your enemies directly with honor, sword and shield.

  • Rogue: Be quick and dodgy, irreverent and against the system and all that it represents. Enjoy poisons and knifing your enemies.

  • Cleric: Worship the Empress goddess and righteously judge her enemies. Use hammer and holy water to fight for what is true.
